<code>
public int minDistance(String word1, String word2) {
    if (word1 == null || word2 == null) return 0;
    
    int m = word1.length(), n = word2.length();
    int[][] dp = new int[m+1][n+1];
    
    for(int i = 0; i <= m; i++) {
        for(int j = 0; j <= n; j++) {
            if (i == 0) dp[i][j] = j;
            else if (j == 0) dp[i][j] = i;
            
            if (word1.charAt(i-1) != word2.charAt(j-1)) 
                dp[i][j] = Math.min(dp[i-1][j], dp[i][j-1]) + 1;

public int findJudge(int n, int[][] trust) { int[] trustScores = new int[n + 1]; for (int[] t : trust) { trustScores[t[0]]--; trustScores[t[1]]++; } for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) if (trustScores[i] == n - 1) return i; return -1; }

public class X { private boolean isAdult; private boolean notRetired; public void setAge(int a) { this.isAdult = (a >= 18); this.notRetired = (a <= 65); } public boolean ok() { return isAdult && notRetired; } }
String f(int x) { if (x == 1 || x == 2) return "a"; return "b"; }
